title: Easy End Lock
description: Lock the End and/or End Portals.
body:
Easy End Lock is a lightweight server utility designed to make it easier for server owners to lock and unlock the End. It adds several commands with two modes.

### Features:

*   /easyendlock **lock** — Locks the end.
*   /easyendlock **unlock** _(countdown)_ — Unlocks the end with an optional countdown (Displayed in chat).
*   /easyendlock **status** — Displays the Lock, PartialFillAllowed, and LockDimension status
*   /easyendlock **partialfillallowed** (True/False) — If false, players won’t be able to put Eyes of Ender in portal frames; if true, they can put eyes in all frames except the last one. (Default is true)
*   /easyendlock **lockdimension** (True/False) — If false, locking will only affect portals; if true, players in the End or attempting to enter the End will be teleported to their spawn point.
*   Visual indicators showing the End is locked when attempting to enter the End or activate the portal.
*   **OPd players bypass all locks.**

The Status command:  
![The Status command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bbddddd855cea4be1a26b69fedcaf33baefc1b9.png)

The End unlocking after a countdown:   
![The Unlock command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9198888f160ae783b8699153f1c9df95eae022e.png)!


### Performance and Environment

Easy End Lock is very lightweight and runs solely on the server. The performance impact is mostly negligible.

### For Modpacks

This mod may be used in any modpack as long as it is distributed via CurseForge or Modrinth and links to the official project page. Redistribution of the jar file is not permitted.

 

Made w/ <3 by Emrillion
